languages.text: Однако выросшее внутри судна влияние Адептус Механикус буквально вырвало легенду из рук династии. Флагман был отнят у Вольного Торговца флотом "Осознание" в унизительной сделке, от которой невозможно было отказаться.

However, the growing influence of the Adeptus Mechanicus within the ship wrenched the legend out of the dynasty's hands. The flagship was confiscated from the Rogue Trader by the Cognisance Fleet in a humiliating deal that could not be refused.
languages.original_text: Однако выросшее внутри судна влияние Адептус Механикус буквально вырвало легенду из рук династии. Флагман был отнят у Вольного Торговца флотом "Осознание" в унизительной сделке, от которой невозможно было отказаться.

traits.locale_text: However, the growing influence of the Adeptus Mechanicus within the ship wrenched the legend out of the dynasty's hands. The flagship was confiscated from the Rogue Trader by the Cognisance Fleet in a humiliating deal that could not be refused.

However, the growing influence of the Adeptus Mechanicus within the ship wrenched the legend out of the dynasty's hands. The flagship was confiscated from the Rogue Trader by the Cognisance Fleet in a humiliating deal that could not be refused.

However, the growing influence of the Adeptus Mechanicus within the ship wrenched the legend out of the dynasty's hands. The flagship was confiscated from the Rogue Trader by the Cognisance Fleet in a humiliating deal that could not be refused.

languages.text: しかし、その船内での機械神殿の台頭により、その伝説は王朝から奪われた。この旗艦は、拒否できない屈辱的な取引で、認知艦隊によってローグトレーダーから没収された。
languages.original_text: However, the growing influence of the Adeptus Mechanicus within the ship wrenched the legend out of the dynasty's hands. The flagship was confiscated from the Rogue Trader by the Cognisance Fleet in a humiliating deal that could not be refused.

traits.locale_text: しかし、その船内での機械神殿の台頭により、その伝説は王朝から奪われた。この旗艦は、拒否できない屈辱的な取引で、認知艦隊によってローグトレーダーから没収された。

languages.text: 然而，机械修会在舰船上的影响力与日俱增，最终从王朝手中夺走了这个传奇。在一次不容拒绝的屈辱交易中，真理开拓者舰队从行商浪人手上没收了这艘旗舰。
languages.original_text: However, the growing influence of the Adeptus Mechanicus within the ship wrenched the legend out of the dynasty's hands. The flagship was confiscated from the Rogue Trader by the Cognisance Fleet in a humiliating deal that could not be refused.

traits.locale_text: 然而，机械修会在舰船上的影响力与日俱增，最终从王朝手中夺走了这个传奇。在一次不容拒绝的屈辱交易中，真理开拓者舰队从行商浪人手上没收了这艘旗舰。

languages.text: Cependant, l'influence grandissante de l'Adeptus Mechanicus à bord du vaisseau arracha la légende des mains de la dynastie. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} fut {mf|contraint|contrainte} d'accepter un accord humiliant qui {mf|le|la} priva du vaisseau amiral, confisqué par la Flotte de la Connaissance.
languages.original_text: However, the growing influence of the Adeptus Mechanicus within the ship wrenched the legend out of the dynasty's hands. The flagship was confiscated from the Rogue Trader by the Cognisance Fleet in a humiliating deal that could not be refused.

traits.locale_text: Cependant, l'influence grandissante de l'Adeptus Mechanicus à bord du vaisseau arracha la légende des mains de la dynastie. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} fut {mf|contraint|contrainte} d'accepter un accord humiliant qui {mf|le|la} priva du vaisseau amiral, confisqué par la Flotte de la Connaissance.

languages.text: Sin embargo, la influencia cada vez mayor del Adeptus Mechanicus en la nave arrebató la leyenda de las manos de la dinastía. La nave insignia acabó confiscada por la Flota Conciencia en un trato humillante que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente no pudo rechazar.
languages.original_text: However, the growing influence of the Adeptus Mechanicus within the ship wrenched the legend out of the dynasty's hands. The flagship was confiscated from the Rogue Trader by the Cognisance Fleet in a humiliating deal that could not be refused.

traits.locale_text: Sin embargo, la influencia cada vez mayor del Adeptus Mechanicus en la nave arrebató la leyenda de las manos de la dinastía. La nave insignia acabó confiscada por la Flota Conciencia en un trato humillante que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente no pudo rechazar.

languages.text: Ancak Adeptus Mechanicus'un gemi içindeki artan etkisi, efsaneyi hanedanlığın ellerinden kopardı. Sancak gemisi, reddedilemeyecek derecede aşağılayıcı bir anlaşmayla Malumat Filosu tarafından Hür Tacir'den müsadere edildi.
languages.original_text: However, the growing influence of the Adeptus Mechanicus within the ship wrenched the legend out of the dynasty's hands. The flagship was confiscated from the Rogue Trader by the Cognisance Fleet in a humiliating deal that could not be refused.

traits.locale_text: Ancak Adeptus Mechanicus'un gemi içindeki artan etkisi, efsaneyi hanedanlığın ellerinden kopardı. Sancak gemisi, reddedilemeyecek derecede aşağılayıcı bir anlaşmayla Malumat Filosu tarafından Hür Tacir'den müsadere edildi.

languages.text: Allerdings entzog der wachsende Einfluss des Adeptus Mechanicus der Dynastie das Narrativ hinsichtlich der Legende. Das Flaggschiff {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} wurde von der Erkenntnisflotte im Rahmen eines demütigenden Abkommens konfisziert.
languages.original_text: However, the growing influence of the Adeptus Mechanicus within the ship wrenched the legend out of the dynasty's hands. The flagship was confiscated from the Rogue Trader by the Cognisance Fleet in a humiliating deal that could not be refused.
